data.title: Expect notable US crypto legislation and regulation developments in 2026, following key changes in 2025. #cryptocurrency #USPolicy
data.description: In 2025, there were notable shifts in US crypto policy as the Trump administration and numerous pro-crypto officials assumed power. These changes are expected to have lasting effects, possibly reaching into 2026.

data.title: Therap Services improves individual plan workflows to enhance efficiency for organizations in LTSS and HCBS industries.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, in Torrington, Connecticut, Therap Services, a top provider of HIPAA-compliant electronic documentation solutions for Long-Term Services and Supports (LTSS), Home and Community-Based Services (HCBS), and various human services sectors, announced significant developments. The organization is recognized as a national leader in its field.

data.title: 2025 Innovations in Alzheimer's Caregiving Awards winners announced, each awarded $20,000. Celebrating the 18th year.
data.description: Three organizations located in different parts of the United States have been selected to receive $20,000 each. This announcement was made in San Francisco on December 23, 2025, marking the 18th year of the Innovations in Alzheimer's Caregiving Awards. The recipients of this funding are The Rosalinde and Arthur Gilbert Foundation, RRF Foundation for Aging, and Family Caregiver Alliance.

data.title: Andy Halpern retires as VP of Central Region at Shaw-Ross International Importers, James LaFleur takes over. Dec 23, 2025.
data.description: In a recent update, Shaw-Ross International Importers announced the retirement of Andy Halpern, a longstanding executive in the company. Stepping into the vacant position of Vice President for the Central Region is James LaFleur, a seasoned commercial leader. This move comes as part of the company's strategy to support growth in their operations. The transition took place in Miami on December 23, 2025. Shaw-Ross International Importers is recognized as a prominent player in the wine and spirits industry in the United States.

data.title: Leopard Imaging debuts new Time-of-Flight MIPI camera at CES 2026 featuring onsemi Hyperlux ID sensor AF0130.
data.description: Leopard Imaging Inc., a leading player in smart vision solutions worldwide, has recently introduced the LI-AF0130-VCL-MIPI-085H Time-of-Flight (ToF) MIPI camera, utilizing the onsemi Hyperlux™ ID iToF sensor AF0130. The innovative camera model was unveiled in Fremont, California, on December 23, 2025. This cutting-edge technology is set to revolutionize various industries with its advanced features and capabilities.

data.title: Bitcoin Cash price dips 3.6% to $572.50 amid thin holiday trading. Institutional traders scale back positions before year-end.
data.description: The price of BCH has experienced a 3.6% decrease, reaching $572.50. This drop comes as holiday liquidity decreases, leading to a test of crucial support levels. Institutional traders are also reducing their positions before the year ends, adding to the market uncertainty.

data.title: UNI drops 6% after 19% rally, now at $5.71; 'Unification' vote fueled surge last week.
data.description: After a significant 19% surge last week due to the 'Unification' governance proposal vote by the community, Uniswap's UNI token has now retraced back to $5.71. The pullback is attributed to profit-taking pressures that have pushed the token below its recent peak.
